title: PolyStash
description:
PolyStash is a collection of improvements and changes that blend with the vanilla Minecraft experience.

Optimised as much as possible to make it available to almost everybody!
body:
PolyStash is a collection of improvements and changes that blend with the vanilla Minecraft experience. Optimised as much as possible to make it available to almost everybody!
### Set leaves to smart # Custom - Titlescreen background - Fences and gates - GUI - Glowing torches - Lightmap - Enchantment particles - Loadingscreen logo - Loadingscreen colours - Doors and trapdoors - Buttons and pressure plates - Sky and fog colours - Hearts and Food - Minimal armour - Enchanted glint - Menu buttons - Chorus plants - Jeb_ sheep # 3D - Doors - Trapdoors - Ores - Crafting table - Furnace - Sugar cane - Lily pad - Mushrooms and fungi - Sweet berry bush - Rails - Iron bars - Loom - Cartography table - Blast furnace - Smoker - Bookshelves - Enchanting table - Brewingstand arms and bottles - End portal frames - Composter - Lodestone - Cactus models - Carved pumpkin - Jack 'o lantern - Jukebox - Hay blocks - Chains - Ladders - Lanterns - Soul lanterns - Frogspawn - Pumpkin stem - Melon stem - Armourstand inventory icon - Inventory icons for blocks and placeable items (doors, plants, tall plants, cauldron, glass panes, etc) # Improvements - Block-edge overlays for almost all natural blocks - Grass and foliage biome-colours - Grass block variants have their grass lower - Leaves are bushy - Font resolution doubled - Flowers all have variants - Grasses have variants - Moss carpets drape down - Wheat model variations and colours - Kelp model variations - Brown mushroom variants - Red mushroom variants - Crimson roots variations and emissives - Warped roots variations and emissives - Weeping vines variations - Twisting vines variations - Nether sprouts variations - Dead bush variations - Visual blockstate for age 25 kelp - Visual blockstates for beehive and bee nest honey level - Visual blockstates for scaffolding distance - Visual blockstates for farmland moistness - Fences look accurate in the inventory - Logs and bamboo have roots - Logs and bamboo have a transition to stripped overlay - Signs are overhauled - Hanging sings have a similar texture to regular signs - Sheep fur colour matches wool colours - Suspicious sand and gravel is more suspicious - Campfire ash removed when unlit - Dyes are unique - Dye piles increase in size depending on amount - Bricks, brick slabs, brick stairs, and brick walls are variated - Redstone dust is thicker - Model and texture fixes for 13 types of walls - Model fixes for 8 types of walls - Colourfix for both types of nylium - HUD overhaul including numbers - Shulker box GUIs - Cluster edge for ice - Cluster edge for packed ice - Cluster edge for blue ice - Additional nether wart growth stage - Sticky piston sides - Levers have a power groove - Larger saplings with square pixels - Remodelled flower pots with included flower variations - Armourstands have player shapes - Bow animation framerate doubled - Rocket sizes for each flight duration - Buckets of Axolotls have age and colour variants - Nametags look (un)written - Doors have shading from one side instead of mirrored - Debug stick magic wand - Redstone colours redone - XP orb colours are happier - Horizontal plank CTM - Variated brewingstand potion colours - Smoother stonecutter animation - Random rotations for pumpkins and melons - Random rotations for moss blocks and carpets - Different colours for pumpkin and melon stems - Iron Golem has red flowers - Slime jump particles changed to slime block - Random rotation for lanterns and soul lanterns - Blazes’s rods fix - Sea pickles model fix
